title: Chapter 96
content:
Chapter 96: 96 | Allies, by Mutual Benefit

I waited for the judgment. The disgust. The moral outrage.

Aurora just smiled wider.

"What about the buff?" she asked. "You said they get a rank boost."

Here came the hard part.

"That only happens if I cum inside them."

Silence.

The ocean crashed below us. Loud in the quiet.

Aurora’s expression didn’t change. She just watched me.

"So the full process," she said slowly. "You need to make them orgasm three times to steal their ability. And you need to finish inside them to give the buff."

"Yeah."

"And Naomi knows this."

"She knows everything. Agreed to all of it."

"And Belle?"

I winced. "I forgot to mention the finishing inside part until after."

"Ouch." Aurora’s mouth twitched. "That explains why she’s pissed."

"I told her the truth after. Offered to complete the process. She said no."

"Smart girl." Aurora pulled another candy from her pocket. Unwrapped it with her teeth. "Belle doesn’t strike me as someone who shares easily."

"She’s not."

Aurora popped the candy in her mouth. Stared at the darkening water.

I waited.

She was going to run. Obviously. Who wouldn’t?

Some perverted lottery kid with a death timer and a system that required sex to function?

That’s horror movie villain territory.

"So if I agreed," Aurora said. Not looking at me. "You’d need me to orgasm three times and then you’d finish inside me?"

"Yeah."

"And I’d get a rank boost for twenty-four hours."

"Gold tier. Your Sensory Hijack would be unstoppable."

Aurora turned her head. Met my eyes.

"And you’d get my ability permanently. Even if it’s Copper ranked at first."

"Yeah."

She nodded slowly. Processing.

"That’s not a bad deal actually."

I blinked. "What?"

"I said it’s not a bad deal." Aurora stood. Brushed grass off her leggings. "I get a power boost. You get a new toy for your collection. Both of us benefit."

"You’re not freaked out?"

"About the incubus ability you got?" She shrugged. "I mean it’s weird as hell. But I’ve seen weirder shit in gates."

"About the sex part."

Aurora’s green eyes found mine. Serious now.

"I don’t fuck just anyone."

"Okay."

"I’m serious. Despite what people say about me. Despite my reputation." She crossed her arms. "I’ve only slept with boyfriends. People I actually cared about."

"How many?"

"Two. Both in high school. Both thought they could keep up with me." Aurora’s mouth curved. "They couldn’t."

Something in my chest shifted. Interest maybe. Challenge.

"Keep up how?"

"I’m a lot." Aurora gestured vaguely at herself. "Sexually. Most guys tap out after round one and want to sleep. I’m just getting started."

"Your ability makes sex better."

"My ability makes everything better. Or worse. Depending." She tilted her head. "But yeah. I can make people feel whatever I want them to feel. Taste whatever. See whatever."

"That’s cheating."

"It’s efficient." Aurora stepped closer. "And you’re one to talk. Your ability literally makes women orgasm on command."

"It’s more nuanced than that."

"Sure it is." Her smile turned sharp. "So here’s my question for you, Jace Monroe."

She stopped right in front of me. Close enough I could smell her perfume. Something floral with vanilla underneath.

"Can you keep up?"

My brain went offline for exactly three seconds.

Then rebooted.

Aurora stood there with her hands on her hips. Challenging me.

Not threatening. Not manipulating. Just asking straight.

And the answer was obvious.

"Yeah." I held her gaze. "I can keep up."

"Promise?"

"I promise."

"Good." Aurora sat back down beside me. "Then I’m in."

"Just like that?"

"Just like that." She pulled out her phone. Started scrolling. "But we’re doing this properly. Not some desperate extraction in your dorm room with your teammates mad at you."

"What’s properly?"

"Date first." Aurora glanced at me. "Real one. Off campus if we can swing it. Somewhere that isn’t the dining hall or a training field."

"Why?"

"Because contrary to my slut reputation, I actually like the person before I sleep with them." She pocketed her phone. "And because if I’m going to let you steal my ability and drink supernatural milk from my tits, I want to know you’re not going to be weird about it after."

The bluntness hit me sideways.

Aurora just smiled.

"What?" she said. "You can say orgasm and essence extraction but I can’t say tits?"

"Fair point."

"I know." Aurora stood again. Offered me her hand. "Come on. Walk me back to Building G before it gets too dark."

I took her hand. Let her pull me up.

We started walking back toward campus proper. The path curved away from the cliffs.

"Saturday," Aurora said. "After your assessment. Assuming you don’t die in the gate."

"I won’t die."

"Confident." She bumped her shoulder against mine. "I like that too."

My phone buzzed.

Aurora’s buzzing at the same time.

I checked. Group message.

Misato to the Midnight Foxes chat.

Emergency squad meeting. Field Gamma. Now.

Belle responded first.

Why?

Just get here. All of you.

Jordan sent a gif of someone screaming.

Naomi replied with a simple okay

.

I looked at Aurora. "Emergency meeting."

"Of course." Aurora sighed. "You humiliated her. She’s probably planning revenge."

"Great."

"Want backup?" Aurora’s tone stayed light but something beneath it was serious. "I can come. Tell Blair I was your escort."

"You don’t need to get involved."

"I’m already involved. You told me about your ability." Aurora squeezed my hand once. "That makes us allies. And allies show up."

Something warm spread through my chest. Not Euphoric Feedback. Something else.

"You don’t even know me."

"Not yet." Aurora’s smile came back. "But I’m working on it."

We reached Building C. The entrance glowed with lobby lights.

Aurora stopped. Released my hand.

"Go deal with Blair. Don’t let her intimidate you." She tapped my chest. Right over my heart. "You said no once. Say it again if you have to."

"What if she makes good on her threats?"

"Then you call me." Aurora pulled out her phone. "I’m ranked twenty-three."

"You’d fight Blair for me?"

"I’d fight anyone for good entertainment." Aurora winked. "Plus I like underdogs. Makes the story better when they win."

She turned. Started walking toward Building G.

Called back over her shoulder.

"See you Saturday, vampire incubus boy!"
